financial_aid.verification: ~25% selected. Submit docs via my.uic.edu. 2-3 weeks to process.
financial_aid.sap_policy: 67% completion ratio, 2.00 GPA, within 150% of degree hours required.

billing.payment_plan: UI-Pay via Nelnet, 6 installments for fall/spring
billing.refund_timing: Aid disburses 10 days before semester. Refunds via direct deposit.

emergency_aid.name: U&I Care Emergency Fund
emergency_aid.eligibility: Currently enrolled students with unexpected financial hardship
emergency_aid.how_to_apply: Through Office of the Dean of Students

scholarships.description: 500+ scholarships. One portal for all UIC scholarships.

student_employment.hourly_range: $16.00 to $21.51 based on FY2026 student wage plan
student_employment.work_study: Request on financial aid notification. Find jobs independently through Handshake.

graduate_funding.ta_ra_ga_waiver: Tuition waived for 25%-67% appointments lasting 91+ days
graduate_funding.fellowship_stipend_minimum: $33,000 for new Graduate College recruitment fellowships (AY 2025-26)
